query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, u.passwordHash, e.companyName 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN erp_companies e ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id 
WHERE e.companyName LIKE '%test%' OR e.companyName LIKE '%Test%' OR u.email LIKE '%test%'
LIMIT 10;
